data.name: 忍墮－女忍調教
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


關於此遊戲


💟故事簡介💟
事件發生在戰國時期。
我方陣營，很幸運地捕捉到被稱為
「最強之忍」的敵方少女「綾目」
這時身為主角的你，接到上頭傳來了這樣的命令。

「徹底調教綾目，讓她投降倒戈吧…！」


💟遊戲內容💟
只需要用滑鼠點擊操作就能簡單享受調教的樂趣
是一款摸摸調教模擬遊戲！

調教場景包含全動畫&全語音
可以盡情觀賞利用Live2D製作的超流暢動畫。

能夠摸摸的場景(模組數)高達35種；
動作畫面(動作的種類)甚至有超過4000種！


正是因為有如此多樣的選擇，
所以完全不會厭煩，可以不斷地玩下去！


有「侍奉」「凌辱」「恥辱」3種不同系統的調教可供挑選
隨著不同的選擇結局也會逐漸產生變化。


總共有21種結局！
結局更會有特別CG及色色的劇情。（BAD END也會有）

💟其他特色💟

・色色階段變化
隨著淫亂度上升，女孩的反應也會有所變化！

・令人愉悅的LOOP功能
「想要放開滑鼠認真欣賞動畫。」你可能會有這樣的需求，
沒問題，大部分的動作都能夠使用LOOP功能循環播放！

・速度變化也很完善
最重要的動作表現，從「緩慢」開始，
到令人覺得「不需要這麼快吧？」──超乎想像的「高速」為止，
我們幫你準備了多段的速度調整選項！


・夜晚行動系統
夜晚是主角的自由行動時間，
依據不同的行動選擇，說不定會跟某人變得更親密喔！

・紙娃娃更衣系統
跟女孩變得更親密後，就能夠替她換裝。
換上不同服裝後H場景也會跟著改變喔！

data.short_description: 在戰國時期，我方陣營捕捉到了被稱為「最強之忍」的敵方少女「綾目」。此時你接到來自上頭的命令，「徹底調教綾目，讓她投降倒戈吧…！」 流暢的全Live2D動畫及全語音劇情，只需要滑鼠就能遊玩的調教模擬遊戲！
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Intel Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間

data.name: Fallen Shinobi
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


About the Game

It is an era of warring states.

By some good fortune, your side has managed to capture from the enemy

a girl called Ayame—hailed as the strongest shinobi in all of Japan.

Your chief then gives you an order.

"Train that shinobi dog Ayame so that she becomes our dog instead!"

Fallen Shinobi is a sex training simulation game with fun and easy-to-learn point-and-click controls.

All training scenes are fully voiced and fully utilize Live2D for slick and smooth animation.

With an incredible 35 different models of Ayame to grope and feel up,

and over 4000 motion animations to compliment them,

you'll be kept entertained for hours upon hours of gameplay.

You can train Ayame in three different ways: by letting her pleasure you, by violating her, or by disgracing her.

How you carry out your training will effect what ending you get, with over 21 sexy animated endings to discover, both good and bad!

Game Features:

- Dynamic Lewdness

Ayame's reactions will change according to how lewd you get!

- Conveniently Looped Animations

Many of the game's animations can be left to run on loop for those times when you want to have a hand spare.

- Variable Animation Speed

The major animations have many different speeds they can be played at.

So whether you want to take things nice and slow, or thrust over and over like crazy, Fallen Shinobi has you covered.

- Free-time System

After a hard day's training, you'll have free time at night to do what you want.

You can even choose to spend the night getting intimate with other girls if you so please!

- Customizable Costumes!

Become friendly with the girls, and you'll be able to customize their costumes!

The girls can also wear their costumes in the sex scenes too!

data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Intel Graphics
  • Storage: 12 GB available space

  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
